ranking_formula: rank + tier sourced from Footballers Expert Rookie Rankings (SFLX PPR consensus, 3 experts, ingested 2026-05-24). primary_rank still tracks ETR SF rank as the audit trail.

big_board.name: Jeremiyah Love
big_board.note: ETR #1 SF + FF #1 (Var 0) + KTC #15 overall. Elite talent in ARI. Crowded backfield + no long-term QB are the live concerns.

big_board.name: Fernando Mendoza
big_board.note: ETR #2 SF (premium setup w/ Kubiak + Bowers + Jeanty) + FF #9 SF (Var 3) + KTC #42. Real analyst disagreement on SF QB value — ETR loves him, Footballers cooler. Blend lands him at #4.

big_board.name: Jordyn Tyson
big_board.note: ETR #4 SF + FF #2 (Var 1) + KTC #51. Injury history is mildly concerning, but still young after 4 yrs of college.

big_board.name: Carnell Tate
big_board.note: ETR #3 SF + FF #3 (Var 1) + KTC #35. Great college numbers vs NFL-quality teammates. Chance to be immediate go-to in TEN.

big_board.name: KC Concepcion
big_board.note: ETR: 'should be top WR fairly quickly.' FF Trull: 'feels like a steal, Flowers with Monken.' Paul Hornung winner. CLE QB mess + Jeudy/Boston room is the live concern — consensus has him #7-9, slightly behind ETR. FALLBACK at 1.05 if Price gone + trade-back fails.

big_board.name: Jadarian Price
big_board.note: MY 1.05. ETR #7 SF + FF #5 (Var 0) + KTC #74. Walker → KC path, Charbonnet ACL — chance to dominate SEA backfield early. RB-room scarcity play for contending roster.

big_board.name: Makai Lemon
big_board.note: ETR #6 SF + FF #4 (Var 0) + KTC #57. AJB replacement narrative. Fit with Hurts is the question per ETR.

big_board.name: Kenyon Sadiq
big_board.note: TE1 of class. 4.39 forty (best TE in 14 yrs), 43.5" vert. R1 capital. Behind Mason Taylor at NYJ. Youngest meaningful target in class. ETR/FF ranks are TEP-inflated — DEFLATE for non-TEP. 1.07 fallback if no trade-down.

big_board.name: Omar Cooper Jr.
big_board.note: R1 capital. 13 TDs, 24% TS at Indiana. 83.3% slot. Behind Garrett Wilson only — better Y1 path than ETR ADP implies. Geno upgrade real. STRONG 1.07 fallback if trade-back fails.

big_board.name: Eli Stowers
big_board.note: Mackey winner. Combine records: 11'3" broad, 45.5" vert. Behind 31-yr-old Goedert + Calc on 1-yr deals = 2027 starter path. Converted QB. DEFLATE rank for non-TEP — but Y1 path is real. 1.07 dart.

big_board.name: Denzel Boston
big_board.note: Big-bodied X (6'4"/212). DID NOT RUN 40 = separation red flag. CLE QB mess + crowded WR room (Jeudy/Tillman/Concepcion). FF Trull would have traded the pick. Skip unless desperate.

big_board.name: DeZhaun Stribling
big_board.note: ETR aggressive (#11). Consensus has him later R2 (KTC #254). 4 schools / 5 yrs college. SF Evans + Pearsall + Kirk room. ETR aggression looks isolated.

big_board.name: Antonio Williams
big_board.note: Clemson true-frosh breakout (age 19.1). 4.41 + 39.5" vert. Slot role w/ Jayden Daniels (elite QB env). Better Y1 path than ETR rank implies — WAS WR2/slot opens long-term. Strong 2.03 value.

big_board.name: Ty Simpson
big_board.note: R1 to LAR behind Stafford (likely final year). McVay successor. 1.06% INT rate, only 1 yr starter. FF/KTC ranks stale (1QB-biased). ETR's #10 SF is the correct take. SF QB stash but our room is deep — skip unless he falls into 2.07+ range.

big_board.name: Chris Bell
big_board.note: 6'2"/220 power-X, 4.44. ACL Nov 2025 — Y1 ramp will be slow. MIA QB downgrade (Willis post-Tua). MIA can be patient (Hill cut, Waddle traded). Y2 upside bet.

big_board.name: Germie Bernard
big_board.note: ETR: 'classic Day-2 Steelers WR.' Behind DK Metcalf + Pittman, Rodgers (42) at QB. Possession profile, weak deep gear. WR3 Y1 ceiling.

big_board.name: Chris Brazzell II
big_board.note: 6'4"/198, 4.37 burner. Behind T-Mac + Legette/Coker, Bryce Young at QB. ETR: 'Tennessee WRs have not translated well.' Vertical-only profile.

big_board.name: Jonah Coleman
big_board.note: ETR: 'long-term Dobbins replacement.' 5'8"/220 power compact, 4.50. Behind Dobbins (injury history) + Harvey (FF sell flag — 49th rush success). Y2 path real. FAILS FF Day-2 R1 RB rule, so 2.07+ only.

big_board.name: Ted Hurst
big_board.note: 6'4"/206, 4.42 + 11'3" broad — small-school traits bet. Behind Godwin (aging) + Egbuka + McMillan. Evans gone to SF opens Y2 path. ETR 'fun small-school option.'

big_board.name: Zachariah Branch
big_board.note: 5'9"/177 (small frame red flag). 4.35 burner. ETR: 'screen merchant with a QB who hates deep.' Penix Y2 unlikely to feed Branch. Pass even if he falls.

big_board.name: Eli Raridon
big_board.note: ETR aggressive (#14) — TWO ACL tears same knee is the live medical red flag. KTC #409 reflects market skepticism. Behind Hunter Henry, Drake Maye QB env good but health is the dealbreaker. Avoid.

big_board.name: Malachi Fields
big_board.note: Power forward (6'4"). 4.61 (slow) but **active OTA buzz** — Harbaugh praise, one-handed catches. Nabers ACL = Y1 target leverage. Age 23.9 caps dynasty upside but Y1 path is live. 2.07 sleeper.

big_board.name: Elijah Sarratt
big_board.note: 44 career TDs, 2.56 YPRR. Lamar attachment is the appeal. BLOCKED — BAL also drafted Ja'Kobi Lane R3 in front of him + has Flowers/Bateman. Age 23 caps. Late-3rd dart.

big_board.name: Ja'Kobi Lane
big_board.note: 6'4"/200, 4.47 + 40" vert. Biggest hands in class. AGE 21.8 + R3 capital + Lamar = checks every Footballers box on paper. But BAL Lamar WR2 has finished sub-600 yds 4 of last 5 yrs — situation drags. 3.07 dart.

big_board.name: Max Klare
big_board.note: R2 capital + McVay loves TEs. BUT deepest TE room in NFL (Higbee/Ferguson/Parkinson). Pass-catching profile. Non-TEP discount stacks with blocked role. Skip.

big_board.name: Oscar Delp
big_board.note: 6'5"/245, 4.49 + 38" vert, 9.83 RAS. NO TE room aging (vets contracts expiring). Weak QB env (Shough). Non-TEP discount. Late-3rd dart only.

big_board.name: Skyler Bell
big_board.note: Elite pro-day agility. AGE 23.9 + Day 3 + BUF WR5-at-best (behind DJ Moore/Shakir/Palmer/Coleman). FF Pod skeptical. AVOID.

big_board.name: Mike Washington Jr.
big_board.note: 6'1"/223, 4.33 + 39" vert. Change-of-pace to Jeanty. ETR 'fantastic size/speed but clearly blocked.' Pure handcuff value.

big_board.name: Emmett Johnson
big_board.note: B1G RB of Year (1,451 + 46 rec). 4.56. Behind Pacheco + Walker (FA signing) + Hunt. ETR 'Charbonnet-lite if he proves himself.' Walker injury history creates path. FAILS FF Day-2 R1 RB rule — 3.07 dart only.

big_board.name: Kaelon Black
big_board.note: OLDEST RB in class (24.6). ETR 'monster reach but pay attention to anyone SF takes.' Shanahan called him RB2 of class. CMC handcuff (413 touches '25). Age + handcuff role caps dynasty value.

big_board.name: Nicholas Singleton
big_board.note: PSU all-time TD record. Behind Pollard (cut candidate) + Spears. ETR: 'raw talent intriguing.' FAILS FF Day-2 R1 RB rule (R5 capital). 3.07 late dart only.

big_board.name: Kaytron Allen
big_board.note: 5'11"/229 bully back. R6 capital is the killer (FF rule: <Day-2 NFL = doomed for R1 rookie picks; 5 of 40 hit). WAS path is real (Robinson traded SF, JCM + White ambiguous). Daniels env. Dart only.

big_board.name: Caleb Douglas
big_board.note: 6'4"/4.39. MIA WR room weak (Hill cut, Waddle traded). Day 2 capital. Massive FF analyst disagreement (47/21/46). High variance dart.

big_board.name: Adam Randall
big_board.note: 232 lbs freaky athlete. Behind Henry (32) + Hill + Ali. Age 21.9 + Henry-handcuff appeal. Fails FF Day-2 rule. Pure dart.

big_board.name: Carson Beck
big_board.note: Behind Brissett (Murray gone). Plausible Y2 starter path. ETR: 'should get some starts but unlikely long-term.' Skip — QB room deep.

big_board.name: Bryce Lance
big_board.note: Older (24.7) small-school combine shredder. Long-term WR3 ceiling. ETR: 'hopefully the long-term WR3.' FantasyPros flagged as outperform.

big_board.name: Eli Heidenreich
big_board.note: ETR: 'high-upside athlete in fairly unsettled backfield.' Late capital. Dart.

big_board.name: Taylen Green
big_board.note: QB4 behind Watson/Sanders/Gabriel. Athletic upside but blocked. Skip.

big_board.name: Zavion Thomas
big_board.note: 5'10"/191, sub-4.3 (Tyreek comp). Ben Johnson offense. HUGE FF analyst spread (68/28/53). Likely overdrafted for special teams.

big_board.name: Cole Payton
big_board.note: Taysom Hill clone. Hurts signed thru '28. Gadget only. Skip.

big_board.name: Drew Allar
big_board.note: Behind Rodgers (42) + Howard + Rudolph. ETR: 'still fairly young despite 3+ yrs starter experience. Maybe regains mojo with PIT.' Y2 open. Deep dart only.

big_board.name: Matthew Hibner
big_board.note: ETR isolated high (#35); KTC #736 reflects market reality. Old + buried + non-TEP. Skip.

big_board.name: Demond Claiborne
big_board.note: 4.37 speed. ETR: 'smaller side but ran well + pass-catching background.' Aaron Jones 31, Mason FA '27. Path is there. Deep dart.

big_board.name: Cade Klubnik
big_board.note: Behind Geno Smith at NYJ. Toolsy. ETR: 'may see some play time while Jets figure out their path.' Deep SF dart.

big_board.name: Justin Joly
big_board.note: Young TE, late capital. Non-TEP discount. Dart.

big_board.name: Brenen Thompson
big_board.note: Late capital, crowded LAC WR room. Dart.

big_board.name: Sam Roush
big_board.note: Late TE. Ben Johnson offense. Non-TEP discount.

big_board.name: Malik Benson
big_board.note: Older WR, deep LV room. Pass.

big_board.name: Garrett Nussmeier
big_board.note: DEAD asset. Once mocked 1st overall, fell to R7 #249 KC (medical?). Buried behind Mahomes + Fields. ETR cratered for a reason. SKIP.

big_board.name: Deion Burks
big_board.note: ETR: 'speedy route-runner who fell massively in the draft.' Buried in IND room.
